## Subject

SEDI: 5.26 sigma combined significance — n=6 arithmetic patterns in particle physics (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19239580)

## Body

Dear CERN Theory Department,

I am Min Woo Park, an independent researcher. I am writing to share results from a systematic analysis of particle physics data that may warrant your attention.

## Summary

Using the arithmetic of perfect number 6 — specifically the divisor functions sigma(6)=12, tau(6)=4, phi(6)=2 and the R-spectrum R(n)=sigma*phi/(n*tau) with R
